dct_title_s: Pomponii Melæ philosophi celeberrimi de orbis situ libri tres : tabulis (quas cetro consilio in finem operis reiecimus) nunc primum illustrati: numeri autem tabulis adiecti, unus quidem paginam, alter uerò, paginę locum, quo reponenda fuerat, monstrat
dct_description_sm: Latitudinal and longitudinal lines along margins.
First 2 and last 2 pages blank (included in page description).
Engraved title page and final page; head-pieces throughout.
"Cum Gratia & Privil. Cæsar, Maiestatis." on title page.
Maps show topography, vegetation, waterways, ports.

Map 1. Africa. -- Map 2. Mauritania. -- Map 3. Numidia. -- Map 4. Cyrenaica. -- Map 5. Aegyptus. -- Map 6. Syria. -- Map 7. Pamphilia. -- Map 8. Scythia Europaea. -- Map 9. Thracia. -- Map 10. Macedonia. -- Map 11. Italia. -- Map 12. Gallia Narbonensis. -- Map 13. Hispania. -- Map 14. Germania. -- Map 15. Scythia. -- Map 16. India. -- Map 17. Sinus Persicus. -- Map 18. Sinus Arabicus. -- Map 19. Aethiopia. -- Map 20. Atlantici Maris Oraet Insulae.
